scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/*/dist packages/*/dist apps/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo node_modules/.cache .turbo
scripts.mcp:clean: rm -rf apps/mcp/dist && claude mcp remove kahuna -s user 2>/dev/null; claude mcp remove kahuna -s project 2>/dev/null; echo 'Cleaned MCP dist and removed kahuna from Claude Code'
scripts.mcp:setup: pnpm --filter @aurite-ai/kahuna build && pnpm --filter @aurite-ai/kahuna bundle && claude mcp remove kahuna -s user 2>/dev/null; claude mcp add kahuna -s user -e ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="$(grep ANTHROPIC_API_KEY apps/mcp/.env | cut -d= -f2)" -- node "$(pwd)/apps/mcp/dist/kahuna-mcp.cjs" && echo 'MCP server built and configured. Restart Claude Code to use it.'
